title: Watch Configuration Schema
description: Configuration file for file watching and syncing.

$schema.description: Path or URL to the JSON schema.

debounceMs.description: Delay in milliseconds before triggering an action after a file change.

createBackups.description: Whether to create backups of files before overwriting.

logLevel.description: The verbosity of the console output.

hooks.description: Commands to execute on specific lifecycle events.

mappings.description: List of files or directories to sync/watch.

id.description: A unique identifier for the mapping, used to link hooks to specific mappings.

source.description: The absolute or relative path to the source file or directory.

destination.description: The absolute or relative path to the destination file or directory.

enabled.description: Whether this mapping is currently active.

description.description: A human-readable description of what this mapping does.

location.description: The working directory where the command should be executed.

listenTo.description: The ID of a mapping to watch. If omitted, the hook applies globally.
